name: agent-arsenal
description: A collection of AI skills, commands, and plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: engineering-core
plugins.description: Core engineering workflows: tech spec writing, architecture review, pre-landing code review, and systematic debugging with root cause investigation

plugins.name: react-native-mobile
plugins.description: Complete React Native + Expo mobile development: app architecture, UI patterns, state management, design systems, animations, and DevOps (EAS Build, Submit, Update, Workflows)

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Research and content discovery: daily tech news digest from ProductHunt, HackerNews, and Reddit, plus Reddit niche scanning for product opportunities

plugins.name: shipping
plugins.description: End-to-end shipping workflow: QA testing with Playwright, automated ship-to-PR pipeline, engineering retrospectives, and conventional commit commands

plugins.name: content-design
plugins.description: Content creation and refinement: editorial-quality HTML info cards, plus AI writing pattern removal for natural-sounding English and Traditional Chinese text

plugins.name: product-planning
plugins.description: Product planning and strategy: idea brainstorming with forcing questions, CEO-mode strategic plan review with 10-section mega review, and designer's eye plan review with 7-pass scoring audit
